title: 2025-12-01 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 6.99
description: New daily signal for 2025-12-01: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 6.99/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-12-01, the score printed 6.99/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
